prompts.description: Add pendingClaudeIngredient state and stop fetchIngredientViaClaude from auto-pushing to catalog
prompts.prompt: In `components/onboarding.tsx`, add a new state variable near the other useState declarations: `const [pendingClaudeIngredient, setPendingClaudeIngredient] = useState<{ name: string; calories: number; protein: number; carbs: number; fat: number; cost: number } | null>(null)`. Then modify `fetchIngredientViaClaude` (currently around line 789): (1) Relax the validation that checks both `data.name` and `data.category` — remove the `data.category` check entirely, only require `data.name` is a non-empty string. (2) Replace the `ingredientCatalog.push(...)` + `addIngredientFromSearch(data.name)` block with: if `ingredientCatalog.some(item => item.name === data.name)`, call `addIngredientFromSearch(data.name)` directly (already exists, no picker needed); otherwise call `setPendingClaudeIngredient({ name: data.name, calories: Number(data.calories) || 0, protein: Number(data.protein) || 0, carbs: Number(data.carbs) || 0, fat: Number(data.fat) || 0, cost: Number(data.cost) || 0 })` — do NOT call `addIngredientFromSearch` in this path. Keep `setFetchingIngredient(false)` in the finally block. Do NOT touch any other state, catalog logic, or built-in ingredient paths. Verify: `npm run build` passes.

prompts.description: Add inline category picker UI that appears after AI ingredient lookup and gates the catalog push
prompts.prompt: In `components/onboarding.tsx`, building on the previous step: (1) Add state: `const [selectedClaudeCategory, setSelectedClaudeCategory] = useState<string | null>(null)`. (2) Add handler `confirmClaudeIngredient` that takes `category: string`: pushes `{ ...pendingClaudeIngredient!, category }` to `ingredientCatalog`, calls `addIngredientFromSearch(pendingClaudeIngredient!.name)`, then resets both `pendingClaudeIngredient` to null and `selectedClaudeCategory` to null. (3) Add handler `cancelClaudeIngredient`: resets both to null. (4) Wherever `setPendingClaudeIngredient` is called with a non-null value, add `setSelectedClaudeCategory(null)` immediately after. (5) In the JSX, locate the 'Can't find it? Look up with AI' Button (around line 2241). Directly after it, render a block only when `pendingClaudeIngredient !== null` containing: a small label showing the ingredient name; a 4-segment row of equal-width buttons for 'Protein', 'Carb', 'Fat', 'Vegetable' — each min-h-[44px], rounded-[14px], composed with `cn()` from `lib/utils.ts`, selected state: `bg-primary text-primary-foreground`, unselected state: `border border-input bg-background text-foreground`, onClick: `setSelectedClaudeCategory(label.toLowerCase())`; a confirm button labeled `Add {pendingClaudeIngredient.name}` with `disabled={!selectedClaudeCategory}`, onClick calls `confirmClaudeIngredient(selectedClaudeCategory!)`; a small 'Cancel' text link, onClick calls `cancelClaudeIngredient()`. Do NOT modify built-in catalog ingredient display or any other push paths. Verify: `npm run build` passes.
